description_long: This is a tracked combat tactical vehicle with a low, rectangular profile and a robust, armored exterior. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, encased in continuous metal tracks, providing excellent mobility over rough terrain. The upper hull is flat and solid, with no visible turret or mounted weaponry, and the front and rear panels are sharply angled for deflection and protection. The surface is finished in a dark, matte color, with some visible hatches and storage compartments on the rear section. The vehicle's design suggests heavy armor coverage across all sides, with reinforced edges and minimal external protrusions. There are no visible windows, lights, or insignia, emphasizing its utilitarian and stealthy appearance.
description: A heavily armored, low-profile tracked combat vehicle with a flat, matte exterior and six large road wheels per side. It features a solid, turretless hull with reinforced edges and no visible weapon mounts or markings.
description_view_0: Front-left view shows the sharply angled front armor and the continuous tracks with six large wheels, highlighting the vehicle's robust, low-slung profile.
description_view_1: Rear-left view reveals the flat rear panel with storage compartments and hatches, as well as the full length of the tracks and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizes the rear storage area and the armored side panels, with the tracks and wheels clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view displays the angled front armor and the uninterrupted, solid upper hull, with reinforced corners and no visible weaponry.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating is visible, with thick, solid panels covering all sides and sharply angled front and rear sections. The armor appears to be monolithic and reinforced, with no modular or reactive elements apparent.
